ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., cognitive psychology) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "output_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment output is stored */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., animation_time_between_frames) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_num" INTEGER /* Participant number */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition the participant is in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the participant gave consent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., n_back_task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the task */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stimulus */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Usage rights for the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the response belongs to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Participant's response */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the response belongs to */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the response belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of block (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the block */,
  "number_of_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., experimental, control) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus used in the trial */,
  "lure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lure used in the trial */,
  "prime_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prime image used in the trial */,
  "focal_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the focal image used in the trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the trial belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_focal_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("focal_image_id") REFERENCES focal_images ("focal_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_prime_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("prime_image_id") REFERENCES prime_images ("prime_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_lure_id FOREIGN KEY ("lure_id") REFERENCES lures ("lure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lures" (
  "lure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lure */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the lure belongs to */,
  "lure_type" TEXT /* Type of lure (e.g., image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the lure */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Usage rights for the lure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lures_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prime_images" (
  "prime_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prime image */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the prime image belongs to */,
  "prime_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the prime image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prime image */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the prime image */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Usage rights for the prime image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prime_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prime_images_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "focal_images" (
  "focal_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each focal image */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the focal image belongs to */,
  "focal_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the focal image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the focal image */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the focal image */,
  "usage_rights" TEXT /* Usage rights for the focal image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("focal_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_focal_images_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "n_back_parameters" (
  "n_back_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each n-back parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the n-back parameter belongs to */,
  "n_back_type" TEXT /* Type of n-back task (e.g., 1-back, 2-back) */,
  "n_back_display_time" REAL /* Display time for the n-back task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the n-back parameter */,
  "number_of_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the n-back task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("n_back_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_n_back_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the experiment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
